mainspring master @ e7ffa22
Source: mainspring/governance/bias_audit.py (post-carve canonical; ORM-free governance)
Vendored (ORM-free verdict): the EEOC 4/5ths PAIRWISE disparate-impact test +
selection / outcome / calibration parity gaps — pairwise_fairness_verdict, plus
BiasThresholds, SegmentMetrics, and the threshold constants — mirrored from
governance.bias_audit (itself ORM-free) into seam.py.
NOT vendored: the BiasAuditResult/GroupMetrics single-group demographic-parity
adapter (demographic_parity_verdict) — that is the accelerator DB-adapter shape,
not the brand's pairwise input; and accelerator/services/bias_audit.py audit()
which runs select(Case) on a Session (NOT ORM-free).
Re-vendor: MAINSPRING_DIR=<ms> bash backend/scripts/vendor_mainspring_bias.sh
